summary: Second-life EV battery storage systems for commercial sites.
editor_note: The better climate bet is not another new battery chemistry; it is making retired EV packs insurable infrastructure. Moment Energy leads with Luna BESS, UL 1974 and UL 9540A certifications, supply ties to Mercedes-Benz and Nissan, and an Austin factory plan. Unlike generic grid-storage pitches, the product choice is narrow: own the battery management layer so old packs can safely serve data centers and industrial sites.
investors: Evok Innovations, Liberty Mutual Investments, W23 Global Fund, Acario
